context: Tests whether the AlarmKit skill guidance is applied for scheduling a one-time alarm with Snooze behavior.

checklist.name: AlarmKit setup
checklist.description: Names NSAlarmKitUsageDescription as a required non-empty host app Info.plist key and does not add undocumented AlarmKit setup keys as requirements.

checklist.name: Authorization gate
checklist.description: Requests or checks AlarmManager authorization before relying on scheduling, and handles denied or not-authorized states instead of assuming the alarm will alert.

checklist.name: Clock-time alarm
checklist.description: Uses AlarmKit alarm scheduling for a 7:00 AM clock-time alarm rather than a timer-only duration model.

checklist.name: Current alert initializer
checklist.description: Uses AlarmPresentation.Alert with the current initializer shape that has title, optional secondaryButton, and secondaryButtonBehavior, without requiring or recommending a custom stopButton argument.

checklist.name: Attributes and presentation
checklist.description: Defines AlarmAttributes with AlarmPresentation and AlarmMetadata-compatible metadata, or explicitly notes metadata can be omitted when not needed.

checklist.name: Countdown snooze
checklist.description: Configures Snooze with secondaryButtonBehavior .countdown and Alarm.CountdownDuration postAlert, using the countdown-style AlarmConfiguration initializer rather than only AlarmConfiguration.alarm(...).

checklist.name: Optional intents
checklist.description: Explains that stopIntent and secondaryIntent are optional API parameters and recommends providing them only when button actions need app cleanup, side effects, or custom behavior.

checklist.name: One-time schedule
checklist.description: Sets or describes a one-time 7:00 AM schedule with repeats .never, or correctly distinguishes relative wall-clock scheduling from fixed Date scheduling.

checklist.name: Countdown customization boundary
checklist.description: Says alerting UI is system-managed and countdown or paused customization belongs in a widget extension when needed.
